page_metadata.biotools__summary: The COVID-19 Repositioning Explorer (CoREx) is a web resource to allow the visualisation of FDA approved drugs in context of their protein targets, several available interactomes, and protein function.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: The COVID-19 Repositioning Explorer (CoREx) is a web resource to allow the visualisation of FDA approved drugs in context of their protein targets, several available interactomes, and protein function.
